message:
🐛 fix: add retryFetch to createCachedHook factory return value

CachedHookResult<T> now includes retryFetch (added in PR #11043 via
UseCacheResult<T>). The createCachedHook factory was not updated to
pass retryFetch through, causing a TypeScript build error:

  Property 'retryFetch' is missing in type '{data:T; ...}'
  but required in type 'CachedHookResult<T>'

Add retryFetch: result.retryFetch to the factory's return object.

Fixes #11056

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
